title: Invariant Manifolds for Capillary Waves and a Class of Quasilinear PDEs
summary:
This paper studies the local stable and unstable manifolds of equilibria for quasilinear and fully nonlinear PDEs. These manifolds are fundamental objects in the analysis of local dynamics. While their existence is well understood for ODEs, semilinear PDEs, and certain parabolic-type quasilinear PDEs, invariant manifold theorems are often unavailable for quasilinear PDEs whose nonlinearities involve a loss of regularity and whose linear parts do not provide sufficient smoothing.
  Our main results establish the existence, uniqueness, and smoothness of local stable and unstable manifolds for nonlinear PDEs that satisfy suitable energy estimates. With the main focus on irrotational water waves with surface tension, this framework applies to a broad class of PDEs, including nonlinear Schrödinger equations, nonlinear wave equations, and the MMT model, as well as to certain gradient-type PDEs.

AI.tldr: 建立了拟线性和完全非线性PDE平衡点局部稳定流形与不稳定流形的存在性、唯一性和光滑性理论
AI.motivation: 研究拟线性和完全非线性PDE局部动力学的核心问题：虽然ODE、半线性PDE和某些抛物型拟线性PDE的稳定流形理论已成熟，但对于非线性项涉及正则性损失且线性部分缺乏充分光滑性的拟线性PDE，不变流形定理往往不可用
AI.techniques: 基于合适的能量估计框架，发展了适用于非线性项有正则性损失的PDE的流形构造方法，特别关注带表面张力的无旋水波方程
AI.main_theorems: 建立了满足适当能量估计的非线性PDE局部稳定流形与不稳定流形的存在性、唯一性和光滑性定理，该框架适用于非线性薛定谔方程、非线性波动方程、MMT模型及梯度型PDE等广泛类型
AI.significance: 填补了拟线性PDE局部动力学理论的空白，为分析水波方程等物理重要模型的局部稳定性提供了严格数学基础，扩展了不变流形理论的应用范围

title: Liouville theorems for mixed local and nonlocal indefinite equations
summary:
We investigate the qualitative properties of positive solutions to mixed local-nonlocal equations with indefinite nonlinearities, emphasizing the interaction between classical and fractional Laplacians. We first establish maximum principles and prove strict monotonicity along the $x_1$-direction for mixed elliptic operators. By combining a mollified first eigenfunction with a suitable sub-solution, we derive nonexistence results for the mixed operator $ (-Δ)^s - Δ$ via a contradiction argument. These results are further extended to the parabolic setting, incorporating both the Marchaud-type fractional time derivative and the classical first-order derivative, revealing new qualitative features under dual nonlocality.
  A key aspect of our approach is a careful adaptation of the method of moving planes to the mixed local-nonlocal context. By addressing the distinct scaling behaviors of local and nonlocal terms, the method yields monotonicity and Liouville-type results without standard decay assumptions, and provides a framework potentially applicable to a broader class of mixed elliptic and parabolic problems.

AI.tldr: 建立了混合局部-非局部算子的单调性、Liouville型定理和非存在性结果，并发展了适用于此类算子的移动平面法
AI.motivation: 研究具有不定非线性项的混合局部-非局部方程的正解定性性质，特别是经典拉普拉斯算子与分数拉普拉斯算子之间的相互作用
AI.techniques: 移动平面法在混合局部-非局部背景下的适应性改进，结合磨光化第一特征函数与合适子解，矛盾论证法，处理局部项与非局部项的不同尺度行为
AI.main_theorems: 建立了混合椭圆算子的最大值原理和沿$x_1$方向的严格单调性；通过矛盾论证得到混合算子$(-Δ)^s - Δ$的非存在性结果；将结果推广到抛物情形，包含Marchaud型分数时间导数和经典一阶导数
AI.significance: 为混合局部-非局部算子提供了系统的定性分析工具，揭示了双重非局部性下的新定性特征，为更广泛的混合椭圆和抛物问题提供了分析框架

title: Weakly-singular formulation of the Fractional Laplacian operator
summary: This paper presents a new formulation of the fractional Laplacian operator $(-Δ)^s$ in $n$-dimensional space ($n \ge 1$). The proposed formulation expresses $(-Δ)^s$ as a composition of the classical Laplace differential operator and a weakly singular integral operator -- which can be used to reduce e.g. the Dirichlet problem for the fractional Laplacian to a weakly singular integral equation involving both volumetric and boundary integral operators. This reformulation is well suited for efficient and accurate numerical implementation. Although a full description of the associated high-order algorithm is deferred to a subsequent contribution, several numerical examples are included in this paper to demonstrate the high accuracy and computational efficiency achieved by the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出分数拉普拉斯算子的新表述，将其表示为经典拉普拉斯微分算子与弱奇异积分算子的复合，为高效数值计算提供基础。
AI.motivation: 分数拉普拉斯算子在物理、金融和图像处理中有广泛应用，但传统数值方法面临计算复杂度高和精度不足的问题。需要开发更高效、准确的数值计算方法。
AI.techniques: 将分数拉普拉斯算子分解为经典拉普拉斯微分算子与弱奇异积分算子的复合；利用弱奇异积分方程将狄利克雷问题转化为体积积分和边界积分算子；开发高精度数值算法。
AI.main_theorems: 提出了分数拉普拉斯算子的新数学表述：$(-Δ)^s = (-Δ)∘(弱奇异积分算子)$；建立了将分数拉普拉斯狄利克雷问题转化为弱奇异积分方程的理论框架。
AI.significance: 为分数拉普拉斯算子提供了更高效的数值计算框架，降低了计算复杂度，提高了精度，对分数阶偏微分方程的数值模拟有重要推动作用。

title: A Carleman Semi-Discrete Convexification Method Combined With Deep Learning for Electrical Impedance Tomography
summary: In this paper, a new semi-discrete version of the Carleman estimate-based convexification globally convergent numerical method is developed. It is used for the delivery of the starting point for the training procedure of deep learning. An important feature of the continuous version of the convexification method is that its convergence to the true solution is independent on the availability of a good first guess about this solution. A new concept of the h-strong convexity is introduced, where h is the grid step size in the semi-discrete version of the convexification method. The h -strong convexity allows to obtain an a priori accuracy estimate of the starting point for the training step of the deep learning procedure. This approach is demonstrated for a highly nonlinear problem of Electrical Impedance Tomography. Results of numerical experiments for complicated media structures demonstrate the computational feasibility of this procedure.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Carleman估计凸化方法的半离散全局收敛数值方法，用于为深度学习训练提供初始点
AI.motivation: 解决高度非线性逆问题（如电阻抗断层成像）中深度学习训练需要良好初始点的问题，传统凸化方法虽然全局收敛但不依赖初始猜测，但需要与深度学习结合
AI.techniques: Carleman估计凸化方法的半离散化，引入h-强凸性概念（h为网格步长），结合深度学习的训练过程
AI.main_theorems: 发展了半离散凸化方法，证明了h-强凸性，获得了训练初始点的先验精度估计，方法具有全局收敛性且不依赖初始猜测
AI.significance: 为高度非线性逆问题的深度学习求解提供了理论保证的初始点选择方法，提高了计算可行性和收敛可靠性，在医学成像等应用中有重要价值

title: On Counterexamples to Interior $C^2$ Estimates for Monge-Ampère Type Equations
summary: We modify Pogorelov's classic construction to demonstrate the absence of a priori $C^2$ estimates for the equations $\det(D^2 u \pm Du \otimes Du) = f(x)$ in dimension $n \ge 3$. We construct a sequence of solutions $z_\varepsilon$ with second derivatives blowing up at the origin as $\varepsilon \rightarrow 0$, while the corresponding right-hand sides $f_\varepsilon$ admit uniform $C^2$ estimates. Specifically, the counterexamples are given by $z_\varepsilon(x_1, \dots, x_n) = (1+x_1^2)(1+x_2^2)(\varepsilon^2 + η^2)^{α/2},$ where $η= \sqrt{x_3^2 + \dots + x_n^2}$ and $α= 2 - \frac{2}{n}$.

AI.tldr: 通过修改Pogorelov经典构造，证明了在n≥3维空间中方程det(D²u ± Du⊗Du)=f(x)不存在先验的C²估计
AI.motivation: 研究完全非线性椭圆型方程的先验估计问题，特别是针对形如det(D²u ± Du⊗Du)=f(x)的方程，这类方程在几何分析和凸体理论中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 修改Pogorelov的经典构造方法，通过构造特定形式的解序列z_ε，利用参数ε→0时二阶导数在原点的爆破现象
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在n≥3维情况下，方程det(D²u ± Du⊗Du)=f(x)不存在先验的C²估计，构造了反例序列z_ε使得二阶导数在原点爆破而右端项f_ε保持一致的C²估计
AI.significance: 揭示了这类完全非线性椭圆型方程估计理论的局限性，为相关几何问题的正则性研究提供了重要反例，对凸体理论和Monge-Ampère型方程的研究有理论意义

title: Nonlocal eigenvalue problems and superposition operators

AI.tldr: 研究混合局部-非局部算子谱理论，特别关注低阶项符号与经典椭圆理论相反的情况
AI.motivation: 研究混合阶叠加算子及其低阶项符号与经典椭圆理论相反的情况，这类问题在数学物理中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 谱分析方法、正则性理论、极限收敛技术、对不连通区域的特征分析
AI.main_theorems: 特征值方程右侧"局部化"时收敛到经典情况；不连通区域中第一特征函数必变号；不连通区域的第一特征值严格小于各分量；第一特征值在特定条件下既可能简单也可能非简单
AI.significance: 扩展了混合局部-非局部算子的谱理论，揭示了与经典椭圆算子的本质差异，为相关物理模型提供了数学基础

title: On the weighted logarithmic potential operator

AI.tldr: 研究加权对数势算子的特征值问题，建立特征值关于域和权函数的单调性、连续性，以及反向Faber-Krahn不等式等性质。
AI.motivation: 研究加权对数势算子的特征值问题，该算子出现在各种数学物理问题中，特别是与对数核相关的积分算子。研究特征值关于域Ω和权函数w,g的依赖性，以及特征值的几何性质。
AI.techniques: 使用极化方法、变分原理、加权超越直径概念、调和函数理论、最大值原理等分析技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 最大正特征值τ⁺_{w,g}(Ω)关于Ω,w,g的单调性和连续性；2. 在极化下的反向Faber-Krahn不等式；3. 负特征值存在的充分条件（与加权超越直径相关）；4. 二维情形下0特征值的条件（Δlog w为常数时）；5. 调和权函数下的特征函数表示公式和最大值原理变体。
AI.significance: 扩展了对数势算子特征值理论，建立了与几何测度、极化方法和调和分析的联系，为理解这类算子的谱性质提供了新工具，可能在数学物理和几何分析中有应用。

title: Stability of the Shape for Circular Vortex Filaments under Non-Symmetric Perturbations
summary: We establish the nonlinear orbital stability of circular vortex filaments governed by the Localized Induction Equation (LIE) under non-symmetric perturbations, within the framework of [Tani-Nishiyama, 1997]. This result extends the first author's recent work [Aiki, 2025] by removing symmetry assumptions on perturbations. While the circular filaments are known to be Lyapunov unstable due to linear growth of the translational mode, we prove that their shape remains globally stable modulo spatial translations and rotations about the symmetry axis. The crucial ingredient is a geometric stability lemma derived from the conservation of vector fluid impulse, which constrains the low-frequency modulations that are not covered by the relative energy.

AI.tldr: 证明了Localized Induction Equation中圆形涡丝在非对称扰动下的非线性轨道稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究涡丝动力学的稳定性问题，特别是圆形涡丝在Localized Induction Equation下的行为。虽然已知圆形涡丝由于平移模式的线性增长而Lyapunov不稳定，但需要研究其形状在模去空间平移和旋转后的全局稳定性。
AI.techniques: 基于[Tani-Nishiyama, 1997]框架，利用向量流体冲量守恒推导几何稳定性引理，约束相对能量未能覆盖的低频调制，结合相对能量方法分析稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了圆形涡丝在非对称扰动下的非线性轨道稳定性，即涡丝形状在模去空间平移和绕对称轴旋转后保持全局稳定
AI.significance: 扩展了Aiki (2025)的结果，去除了扰动对称性的假设，为涡丝动力学稳定性理论提供了更完整的理解，揭示了守恒律在约束低频调制中的关键作用

title: Nonlocal-to-local $L^p$-convergence of convolution operators with singular, anisotropic kernels
summary: We study nonlocal convolution-type operators with singular, possibly anisotropic kernels. Our main objective is to establish and quantify their nonlocal-to-local convergence to a local differential operator with natural boundary conditions, as the kernels concentrate at the origin in a suitable way. Such convergence results provide a useful tool for the physical justification of mathematical models, particularly in situations where the desired local differential operator cannot be directly derived from microscopic laws. The present work substantially extends previous results by allowing kernels with stronger singularities (comparable to those of fractional Laplacians), anisotropic and non-localized kernels, and by proving strong convergence in general $L^p$ spaces together with explicit convergence rates.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有奇异核的非局部卷积算子的局部极限收敛，建立了到带自然边界条件的局部微分算子的强收敛性及收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 研究背景是物理建模中需要从微观定律推导宏观微分算子的问题。当期望的局部微分算子无法直接从微观定律推导时，非局部到局部收敛提供了一种物理合理性证明工具。核心数学问题是研究奇异核（包括各向异性和非局部化核）的非局部卷积算子向局部微分算子的收敛性。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：非局部卷积算子的分析、奇异核的处理（可比于分数拉普拉斯算子的奇异性）、各向异性核的分析、非局部化核的处理、在一般L^p空间中的强收敛证明、收敛速率的显式估计。
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：建立了非局部卷积算子向带自然边界条件的局部微分算子的强收敛性；允许核具有更强的奇异性（可比于分数拉普拉斯算子）；处理各向异性和非局部化核；在一般L^p空间中证明强收敛；提供显式收敛速率估计。
AI.significance: 理论意义：显著扩展了先前结果，处理更广泛的核类；为物理模型的数学合理性提供严格基础；在非局部到局部收敛理论中取得重要进展；潜在应用于需要从微观描述推导宏观模型的物理和工程问题。

title: On the shape of minimizers for the periodic nonlocal perimeter in $\mathbb{R}^2$
summary:
In this paper, we study planar nonlocal Delaunay sets. That is, open sets in $\mathbb{R}^2$ with constant nonlocal mean curvature that are periodic in $x_1$, and even in $x_1$ and in $x_2$. Using bifurcation analysis and fine explicit computations, we prove that every sufficiently $C^{1,β}$-flat nonlocal Delaunay set in $\mathbb{R}^2$ that is not a straight band is unstable with respect to volume-preserving periodic variations.
  Our results support the conjecture that, as in the local case, in the range of large areas, minimizers of the periodic nonlocal isoperimetric problem -- also known as the nonlocal liquid drop problem with prescribed area between two parallel hyperplanes -- are all straight bands.

AI.tldr: 证明了平面非局部Delaunay集（具有常数非局部平均曲率的周期开集）在足够平坦时相对于保体积周期变分是不稳定的，支持了非局部等周问题在较大面积范围内极小元都是直带的猜想。
AI.motivation: 研究平面非局部Delaunay集（具有常数非局部平均曲率的周期开集）的稳定性问题，旨在理解非局部等周问题（也称为具有规定面积的非局部液滴问题）在周期边界条件下的极小元结构。
AI.techniques: 使用分岔分析和精细的显式计算，结合C^{1,β}平坦性条件，分析非局部Delaunay集相对于保体积周期变分的稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了每个足够C^{1,β}平坦的非局部Delaunay集（不是直带）相对于保体积周期变分都是不稳定的，这支持了在较大面积范围内，周期非局部等周问题的极小元都是直带的猜想。
AI.significance: 为理解非局部等周问题极小元的结构提供了重要理论支持，将经典等周问题的结果推广到非局部情形，对非局部几何分析和相变理论有重要意义。

title: Periodic Delaunay cylinders with constant anisotropic nonlocal mean curvature
summary:
In this article we prove existence and symmetry properties of periodic surfaces of revolution with constant anisotropic nonlocal mean curvature, generalizing a classical result of Delaunay to the anisotropic nonlocal setting.
  First, by studying the corresponding periodic isoperimetric problem, under natural assumptions on the kernel, we use rearrangement inequalities to extend a periodic version of the Wulff inequality to the nonlocal setting. This leads to the existence and symmetry properties of minimizers for every given volume in each period, thus generalizing the results of Cabré, Csató, and Mas to the anisotropic case.
  Second, under the same hypotheses on the kernel, we prove the existence of a one-parameter family of Delaunay near-cylinders in $\mathbb{R}^2$ bifurcating from a straight cylinder and having each constant anisotropic mean curvature. This extends the results of Cabré, Fall, Solà-Morales, and Weth to the anisotropic case. The stability of these near-cylinders will be studied in a forthcoming paper.

AI.tldr: 将Delaunay曲面的经典结果推广到各向异性非局部平均曲率情形，建立了周期旋转曲面的存在性和对称性理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有常数各向异性非局部平均曲率的周期旋转曲面，将Delaunay关于常数平均曲率旋转曲面的经典结果推广到各向异性非局部情形
AI.techniques: 使用重排不等式将Wulff不等式的周期版本推广到非局部情形，通过研究周期等周问题，利用变分方法和分歧理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在核函数满足自然假设下，证明了每个周期内给定体积的最小化子的存在性和对称性；2. 证明了从直圆柱分岔出的Delaunay近圆柱单参数族的存在性
AI.significance: 将经典几何分析中的Delaunay曲面理论推广到各向异性非局部情形，为非局部几何分析提供了新的理论框架，对理解非局部几何流和相变问题有重要意义

title: Overdetermined problems for the rotationally invariant Poisson equation in model manifolds
summary:
We present rigidity results for overdetermined problems associated to the rotationally invariant Poisson equation $-Δ_{g_\mathcal{M}} u = f(r)$ in a model manifold $\mathcal{M} = [0,S) \times_h \mathbb S^{N-1}$ with warping function $h$. The variable $r$ ranges in the interval $[0,S)$, whose endpoint $S$ is positive and possibly infinite. The first part of the paper deals with the problem \[
  \begin{array}{ll}
  -Δ_{g_\mathcal{M}} {u}=f(r) &\mbox{in $Ω$},
  u=\varphi(r) &\mbox{on $\partial Ω$},
  \frac{\partial u}{\partial ν} = κ(r) &\mbox{on $\partial Ω$},
  \end{array} \] where $Ω\subset \mathcal{M}$ is a bounded domain containing the point $O \in \mathcal{M}$ corresponding to $r = 0$, $ν$ is the exterior unit normal vector on $\partial Ω$, and $f$, $\varphi$, $κ$ are three prescribed functions.
  In the second part of the paper, we consider a similar overdetermined problem for the exterior Bernoulli problem in a domain $Ω\setminus \overline B_{R_0}(O)$, where $B_{R_0}(O)$ denotes the geodesic ball centered at $O$ with radius $R_0$, within the class of functions that vanish on $\partial B_{R_0}(O)$. In both cases, we give conditions on $f$, $\varphi$ and $κ$ implying that the solution $u$ is radial and $Ω$ is a geodesic ball centered at $O$. Our results apply in particular to the three space forms $\mathbb{R}^N$, $\mathbb{H}^N$ and $\mathbb{S}^N$.

AI.tldr: 在旋转对称模型流形中，对泊松方程超定问题给出了刚性结果，证明解必须是径向的且区域必须是测地球
AI.motivation: 研究旋转对称模型流形中泊松方程的超定边值问题，这类问题在几何分析和偏微分方程理论中具有重要意义，特别是在确定解的唯一性和区域几何形状方面
AI.techniques: 使用旋转对称模型流形上的几何分析、超定边值问题的刚性理论、比较原理和径向对称性证明技术
AI.main_theorems: 给出了函数f, φ, κ的特定条件下，证明解u必须是径向的且区域Ω必须是中心在O的测地球；结果适用于三种空间形式ℝ^N, ℍ^N和𝕊^N
AI.significance: 推广了经典超定问题的刚性结果到更一般的旋转对称流形，为几何偏微分方程理论提供了新的刚性定理，在几何分析和数学物理中有潜在应用

title: Application of uncertainty principles for decaying densities to the observability of the Schrödinger equation
summary: In this article, we study the Schrödinger equation posed in the Euclidean space. We prove observability inequalities for measurable sets that are thick with respect to decaying densities. The proof relies on quantitative uncertainty principles adapted to decaying densities, notably those established by Shubin, Vakilian, Wolff, and Kovrijkine.

AI.tldr: 证明了欧几里得空间中薛定谔方程在具有衰减密度厚集上的可观性不等式
AI.motivation: 研究欧几里得空间中薛定谔方程的可观性问题，特别关注具有衰减密度的可测厚集上的观测性不等式
AI.techniques: 使用适应衰减密度的定量不确定性原理，特别是Shubin、Vakilian、Wolff和Kovrijkine建立的相关原理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了薛定谔方程在具有衰减密度厚集上的可观性不等式
AI.significance: 扩展了薛定谔方程可观性理论，为具有衰减密度特征的观测集提供了理论框架，在控制理论和反问题中有应用价值

title: Limiting Absorption Principle and Radiation Condition for the Fractional Helmholtz Equation
summary: We investigate elliptic fractional equations in the whole space, involving zero order perturbations of the fractional Laplacian $(-Δ)^s$, $0<s<1$. Our main objective is to determine appropriate radiation conditions at infinity that ensure existence and uniqueness of solutions to the fractional type Helmholtz equation. Extending classical scattering theory for the Helmholtz equation, we introduce and analyze suitable Sommerfeld type radiation conditions for fractional orders. A central contribution is the explicit computation of the outgoing free space Greens function for the operator $(-Δ)^s-k^{2s}$, for all $0<s<1$, any dimension and $k>0$, obtained via contour integration and a limiting absorption principle. We show that its asymptotic behavior at infinity coincides with a rescaled version of the classical Helmholtz fundamental solution, thereby justifying the standard Sommerfeld radiation condition for compactly supported sources. In addition, using resolvent estimates and a limiting absorption framework, we establish existence and uniqueness of outgoing solutions for compactly supported data, and for weighted sources. We further derive a convolution representation of the solution in terms of the outgoing fundamental solution. For inhomogeneous media with compactly supported perturbations, we reformulate the problem as a Lippmann Schwinger integral equation of Fredholm type and prove unique solvability away from a discrete set of frequencies. Our analysis provides a rigorous foundation for scattering theory of fractional Helmholtz operators and offers a framework suitable for numerical implementation of these nonlocal wave propagation models.

AI.tldr: 为分数阶Helmholtz算子建立了完整的散射理论框架，包括辐射条件、格林函数构造和解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶Laplacian的零阶扰动方程，建立分数阶Helmholtz方程的散射理论，确定适当的无穷远辐射条件以保证解的存在唯一性
AI.techniques: 围道积分、极限吸收原理、预解估计、Fredholm型Lippmann-Schwinger积分方程、卷积表示
AI.main_theorems: 显式计算了算子(-Δ)^s-k^{2s}的出射自由空间格林函数；证明了紧支源下出射解的存在唯一性；建立了非齐次介质中问题的Fredholm型积分方程框架
AI.significance: 为分数阶Helmholtz算子的散射理论提供了严格数学基础，为非局部波传播模型的数值实现提供了理论框架

title: Reconstruction algorithms for the fractional Laplacian and applications to inverse problems
summary: We introduce two reconstruction schemes that enable the recovery of a function in the entire Euclidean space $\mathbb{R}^n$ from local data $(u|_W, [(-Δ)^s u]|_W)$, where $W$ is an arbitrarily small nonempty open subset of $\mathbb R^n$ and $(-Δ)^s$ denotes the fractional Laplace operator of order $s\in (0,1)$. These procedures rely crucially on the weak Unique Continuation Property (UCP) for the fractional Laplacian. We apply these schemes to two distinct inverse problems. Following the seminal work from Ghosh et al., the first one concerns the recovery of a potential (Calderón-type problem) from the fractional Schrödinger equation under nonlocal Robin-type exterior conditions. The second one involves recovering the solution of the space-fractional heat equation in $\mathbb{R}^n$ from localized time-dependent measurements within a ball. To tackle these problems, we introduce new analytical tools such as a generalized weak Kelvin transform and a fractional Robin-to-Robin map. Finally, we provide numerical simulations for one of the reconstruction methods, illustrating the stability issues and the severe ill-posedness inherent to such inverse problems.

AI.tldr: 提出了两种基于分数阶拉普拉斯算子弱唯一延拓性的重建方案，用于从局部数据恢复全空间函数，并应用于两个不同的反问题。
AI.motivation: 研究如何从局部数据恢复全空间函数，这是反问题中的核心挑战。分数阶拉普拉斯算子在许多物理和工程问题中都有应用，但其反问题的研究相对较少。论文旨在解决从任意小开集上的局部测量数据重建全空间函数的问题。
AI.techniques: 利用分数阶拉普拉斯算子的弱唯一延拓性；引入广义弱Kelvin变换和分数阶Robin-to-Robin映射；采用数值模拟验证重建方法的稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 提出了两种重建方案：1) 从局部数据$(u|_W, [(-Δ)^s u]|_W)$恢复全空间函数；2) 应用于分数阶薛定谔方程的Calderón型反问题（恢复势函数）；3) 应用于空间分数阶热方程的解恢复问题。
AI.significance: 为分数阶偏微分方程的反问题提供了新的理论框架和数值方法；发展了分数阶算子的分析工具；揭示了这类反问题的严重不适定性，对医学成像、地球物理勘探等应用领域有重要价值。
